title: AN ACT TO CONVERT THE SITIO OF POOK NI BANAL IN THE BARRIO OF MALAKING POOK, MUNICIPALITY OF BAUAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, INTO A BARRIO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1916 / 50 OG No. 6, 2394 (June, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1041, June 12, 1954 ]

AN ACT TO CONVERT THE SITIO OF POOK NI BANAL IN THE BARRIO OF MALAKING POOK, MUNICIPALITY OF BAUAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, INTO A BARRIO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Pook ni Banal in the barrio of Malaking Pook, municipality of Bauan, Province of Batangas, is converted into a barrio to be known as the barrio of Pook ni Banal.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 12, 1954.
